features.name: unnamed procedural block with local variable declaration
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with a local variable declared inside the block using 'integer' type

features.name: multiple unnamed procedural blocks with module instantiation between them
features.description: Code should include two unnamed procedural blocks (always_comb) with a module instantiation placed between them in the module body

features.name: module instantiation in between procedural blocks
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation placed between two always_comb procedural blocks to trigger the name collision bug
